executives.name: Dale Henderson
executives.background: Dale Henderson was appointed as Managing Director and CEO in July 2022, having previously served as the Company’s Chief Operating Officer since 2017. He is an experienced mining executive with a strong track record in operations, project development, and corporate leadership across various commodities including lithium, gold, and base metals.
